contact.title: Let's Meet
contact.description: Write to me on Telegram to arrange a free introductory meeting or ask a question.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I was born in Ufa — a city where Europe meets Asia, where harsh winters give way to generous summers. This duality cultivated in me the ability to see depth where others only notice the surface.
about.paragraph2: After university, I went on Erasmus — and this experience turned my world upside down. I realized: psychology is not about diagnoses, but about encounters. One on one. Soul to soul.
about.paragraph3: Now I live between Asia and Africa, conduct sessions online, and gather groups around the world. Each session is a journey deep into oneself, which I guide with warmth and professionalism.

eot.title: EOT
eot.description: Emotionally Image Therapy. Working with metaphors, dreams, and inner images to access the unconscious.

regression.title: Regression
regression.description: Journey into past states of experience to release stuck emotions and traumatic patterns.

gestalt.title: Gestalt
gestalt.description: Here and now therapy. I help notice unfinished situations and live through them fully.

simboldrama.title: Simboldrama
simboldrama.description: Intuitive drama method. Working with inner characters through guided imagination.

thoughts.title: Thoughts Out Loud
thoughts.quote1: Psychotherapy is not when you're told what to do. It's when you're heard in such a way that you want to hear yourself.
thoughts.quote2: We arrive in a new country but bring our old fears with us. Only when we acknowledge them can we build a true home.
thoughts.quote3: The body remembers everything the mind has forgotten. Sometimes the path to oneself lies through sensation, not analysis.

hero.title: Mira
hero.subtitle: Space of the Soulaa
hero.description: Depth psychology for those seeking themselves. Individual and group sessions online and offline.

individual.title: Individual Session
individual.description: Deep one-on-one work. Suitable for working through a specific request or regular therapy.

package.title: Package of 5 Sessions
package.description: For those ready for transformation. Support throughout the change process.

group.title: Group Session
group.description: Therapeutic group of up to 8 participants. A powerful tool for working with relationships.
